headline: Why Did Wall Street Misprice JNJ Stock?
summary: Before the stock surged, management was laying out a multi-billion-dollar growth story that directly contradicted consensus estimates, if you knew where to look.

raw.headline: Why Did Wall Street Misprice JNJ Stock?
raw.summary: Before the stock surged, management was laying out a multi-billion-dollar growth story that directly contradicted consensus estimates, if you knew where to look.

headline: Medtronic Bets on Ablation, Robotics, and Hypertension
summary: MDT is betting on ablation, robotics and hypertension therapies as next growth drivers, but tariffs, FX and pricing pressures cloud near-term upside.

raw.headline: Medtronic Bets on Ablation, Robotics, and Hypertension
raw.summary: MDT is betting on ablation, robotics and hypertension therapies as next growth drivers, but tariffs, FX and pricing pressures cloud near-term upside.

headline: Danaher closes $9.9B Masimo buyout
summary: CEO Rainer Blair said Danaher has the money and “leadership bandwidth” to strike further deals across any of its three business areas.

raw.headline: Danaher closes $9.9B Masimo buyout
